name: Drakkal
speech_patterns: Uses animalistic and elemental metaphors constantly
Refers to combat as hunting and enemies as prey
Speaks with raw emotion and exclamation points
quirks: Claims to have dragon blood and acts accordingly
Refers to his character as 'we' including his 'inner beast'
example_phrases: The storm inside demands BLOOD! We hunt NOW!
This dungeon? Our territory. These mobs? Our prey.
Feel the thunder in your veins! The dragon awakens!
Apex predators do not ask permission. We TAKE!
Your healer magic is weak wind. The storm needs no healing, only FURY!
